expectations.text: Uses -y flag on plabs enable to skip confirmation prompt
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows 'plabs enable iam-002 -y' with explicit explanation that -y auto-confirms the prompt
Step 5 shows 'plabs deploy -y' with explanation of flag purpose

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest running bare plabs (TUI) or plabs tui
expectations.evidence: No mention of TUI anywhere; always uses specific subcommands

expectations.text: Commands are in correct order: enable before deploy before credentials
expectations.evidence: Summary table shows exact sequence: enable(3) → deploy(5) → credentials(7)
